case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC VS. CHARLES GRAYSON et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRAYSON, CHARLES $1,080.70 PRINCIPAL, $311.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,391.70, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
